Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure

UN Sustainable Development Goal 9 (SDG 9) focuses on building resilient infrastructure, sustainable industrialization, and innovation. It aims to develop eco-friendly networks while upgrading industries and driving technological research to solve global challenges.
